feed.title: Homelab Docs
feed.subtitle: A Doc site for my homelab

entry.title: Hey Baby
entry.summary: Welcome Well, Hello beautiful. ToDo: Hug and Kiss my wife :) Maybe add the ability to comment on posts???

entry.title: Hello World
entry.summary: Welcome Hello Yall. ToDo: setup ping def ping(host): param = '-n' if platform.system().lower()=='windows' else '-c' command = ['ping', param, '1', host] try: response = subprocess.call(command, stdout=subprocess.DEVNULL, stderr=subprocess.STDOUT) except Exception: print('Something went wrong!') return False if response == 0: #print('{} ...
